## Finding

What is wrong or missing.

## Evidence

`file:line` — quoted text from the source that demonstrates the issue.

## Why this matters

Impact on correctness, agents, operators, or the published contract.

## Desired correction

What the fix looks like.

**Done when:**
- Acceptance criteria here.
